accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.hint: Nicknames appear in the header account list.
accounts.newNicknamePrompt: Optional nickname for the new account (leave empty for default):

lockMode.title: Lock Mode
lockMode.description: Require manual approval for all transactions (ignores limits)

export.title: Export Wallet
export.description: Export your mnemonic phrase to import into another wallet.
export.warning: ⚠ Never share your mnemonic with anyone!

deregister.warningBody: Deregistering permanently deletes all wallet data on this device. Back up your mnemonic phrase before proceeding.
deregister.modalBody: This will permanently delete your keys, transaction history, and all wallet data on this device. This action cannot be undone. Make sure you have backed up your mnemonic phrase.
